info.title: Cipi API
info.description:
REST API for Cipi Server Control Panel. Manage Laravel apps, domain aliases, SSL certificates, and MySQL databases.

**Authentication:** All endpoints require a Bearer token via the `Authorization` header.
Tokens are managed with `cipi api token create|list|revoke`.

**Async Operations:** Most write operations (create, edit, delete, SSL, alias add/remove, database create/delete/backup/restore/password) are dispatched as background jobs with `202 Accepted` and a `job_id`. Poll `GET /api/jobs/{id}` to check status. **Database listing** (`GET /api/dbs`) is synchronous (`200`) and runs `cipi db list` on the server (same as the Cipi CLI).

**Sync Validation:** Domain and app existence checks are performed synchronously before job dispatch. Validation errors (409, 404, 422) are returned immediately.

**MCP Server:** An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server is available at `/mcp` with the same authentication.

get.description: List all apps on the server. Requires `apps-view` ability. Returns data synchronously.

post.description:
Create a new app. Validates domain/username synchronously (returns 409/422 on conflict). Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `apps-create` ability.

For **Laravel** apps, `repository` is required. For **custom** apps (`custom: true`), `repository` is optional: omit it (or send empty) to create an SFTP-only site with no Git deploy, matching [Cipi 4.4.4+](https://github.com/cipi-sh/cipi). When no repository is set, do not send `branch`.

get.description: Show app details. Returns data synchronously. Requires `apps-view` ability.

put.description: Edit an app (PHP version, branch, repository). Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `apps-edit` ability.

delete.description: Permanently delete an app and all associated resources. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `apps-delete` ability.

get.description: List domain aliases for an app. Returns data synchronously. Requires `aliases-view` ability.

post.description: Add a domain alias to an app. Validates domain is not in use synchronously (returns 409). Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `aliases-create` ability.

delete.description: Remove a domain alias from an app. Validates alias exists synchronously (returns 404). Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `aliases-delete` ability.

post.description: Trigger a deploy for an app. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `deploy-manage` ability.
Rollback the last deploy of an app. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `deploy-manage` ability.
Unlock a stuck deploy for an app. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `deploy-manage` ability.
Install Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for an app. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `ssl-manage` ability.

get.description: Poll a background job status. Any authenticated token can check any job. Returns status (pending, running, completed, failed). When finished, includes `result` (parsed structured data from Cipi CLI) and `output` (raw CLI output).

Runs `sudo cipi db list` on the server (synchronous), parses the CLI output, and returns the same JSON shape as `cipi-cli` expects for HTTP 200. Secrets stay inside Cipi; no MySQL password in the API `.env`. Requires `dbs-view` and a working `cipi` binary + sudo (same as other Cipi API jobs).

503.description: MySQL listing unavailable (wrong DB driver, connection error, or missing privileges)

post.description: Create a MySQL database and user. Validates `name` as a Cipi username. Returns 409 if a create job for the same name is already pending or running. Dispatches async job. Requires `dbs-create` ability.

delete.description: Delete a database. Dispatches async job. Requires `dbs-delete` ability.

post.description: Create a compressed SQL backup. Dispatches async job. Requires `dbs-manage` ability.
Restore from a `.sql.gz` backup file path on the server. Dispatches async job. Requires `dbs-manage` ability.
Regenerate the MySQL user password for this database. Dispatches async job. Requires `dbs-manage` ability.

get.description: Public endpoint (no auth) used by mobile apps to validate that a URL points to a Cipi server before login. Returns the detected Cipi version when available.
Instant snapshot of CPU, memory, swap, disk, services and uptime. Cached for `CIPI_SERVER_STATUS_CACHE_TTL` seconds (default 15) to keep widgets cheap. Requires `server-view` ability.

Returns minute-resolution metric samples captured by the `cipi:record-server-metrics` scheduled task. Use the `range` query (`1h`, `6h`, `24h`, `7d`, `30d`) to bound the window. Requires `server-view` ability.

Iterates apps + aliases, performs a TLS handshake against `CIPI_SSL_HOST:CIPI_SSL_PORT` (default `127.0.0.1:443`) with SNI, and returns certificates with `days_remaining <= days`. Requires `ssl-view` ability.
Performs a TLS handshake against the app primary domain (and its aliases) and parses the X.509 certificate. Requires `ssl-view` ability.

post.description: Install Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for an app. Validates app exists synchronously. Dispatches CLI command as async job. Requires `ssl-manage` ability.
Alias of `POST /apps/{name}/ssl` for clients that prefer an explicit renew verb. Dispatches the same async `ssl install` job. Requires `ssl-manage` ability.

get.description: Cursor-paginated list of deploys (and rollbacks/unlocks) tracked in `cipi_jobs` for the app. Each item includes status, exit_code, duration and timing. Requires `deploy-view` ability.
Show a single deploy by job UUID, scoped to the app for safe access checks. Includes parsed `result` if the job is finished. Requires `deploy-view` ability.
Returns the captured CLI output of a finished deploy. For live tailing while a deploy is running, use `GET /jobs/{id}/log/tail`. Requires `deploy-view` ability.

Long-poll friendly endpoint to stream the live output of an async job. Pass `from_byte` to receive only the new bytes since the previous call; the response includes `next_byte` to feed back to the next request and `eof: true` once the job has finished and the file has been fully read.

Lists devices registered against the current API token. Devices are isolated per token: a token only sees its own devices and only its devices receive push notifications dispatched for jobs it triggers.

post.description: Register or refresh a push device for the current API token. Idempotent: re-posting the same `push_token` updates metadata. The mobile app should call this on every cold start (or when FCM rotates the token) and again with `last_seen_at: true` periodically via PATCH.

patch.description: Update notification preferences, app/OS version, or refresh `last_seen_at`. Pass `last_seen_at: true` to update the heartbeat timestamp.

delete.description: Delete a device registration. Call this on logout or when the user disables notifications.

get.description: Cursor-paginated activity timeline derived from `cipi_jobs`. Useful as a unified feed for the mobile dashboard. Filter with `type`, `app`, or `status`. Requires `activity-view` ability.
Search across apps, aliases, and database names. Useful for the mobile spotlight on installs with many apps.

BearerAuth.description: Sanctum API token. Create with: cipi api token create

DbName.name: name
DbName.description: Database name (Cipi username rules: lowercase, 3–32 chars)

repository.description: Git repository URL (SSH). Required for Laravel apps; optional for custom apps when using SFTP-only hosting without Git (Cipi 4.4.4+).

branch.description: Git branch when a repository is set. Omit when there is no repository (SFTP-only custom apps).

custom.description: Create a custom (non-Laravel) app with classic deploy. When true, repository may be omitted for SFTP-only sites.

docroot.description: Document root path for custom apps (e.g. dist, public). Default: /

name.description: Database name (must satisfy Cipi username rules; invalid names return 422 with `{ "error": "..." }`)

file.description: Path to a `.sql.gz` backup on the server (safe path characters only). Invalid paths return 422 with `{ "error": "..." }`.

job_id.description: Background job UUID. Poll GET /api/jobs/{id} for status.

app.description: Resolved app name when the job has an `app` or `user` parameter

result.description: Parsed structured result from Cipi CLI (only when status is completed or failed). Structure varies by job type.

output.description: Raw CLI output (only present when status is completed or failed)

exit_code.description: CLI exit code (only present when status is completed or failed)

deploy_key.description: SSH public key for Git (may be absent for SFTP-only custom apps without a repository)

size.description: Human-readable size when reported by CLI

url.description: Connection URL when provided by CLI

JobResultError.description: Result when job failed and parsing could not extract structured data

services.description: Map of systemd unit names to `systemctl is-active` output

eof.description: True when job finished and log fully consumed

last_seen_at.description: When true, refresh the heartbeat timestamp to now().

Conflict.description: Resource conflict (e.g. domain or app already exists, or duplicate pending database create)

tags.name: SSL
tags.description: SSL certificate inspection, install and renewal

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Background job status polling and live log tailing

tags.name: Databases
tags.description: MySQL databases: `GET /dbs` runs `cipi db list` (sync); create/delete/backup/restore/password are async jobs — poll `/jobs/{id}`

tags.name: Server
tags.description: Server status snapshots and time-series metrics for dashboards/widgets

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Mobile device registration for push notifications

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Global search across apps, aliases and databases

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Public probe used by mobile apps to validate the URL during onboarding
